title: CalamityMusicDisc
description: mod for music discs from Calamity mod
body:
This mod adds 107 new music discs from Calamity, 107 discs have their own unique craft, you will like this mod because of the music that can diversify, for example, boring digging in mines and in fights with mobs

creator of music for calamity DM_DOKURO,PinpinNeon,CDMusic,ENNWAY,HeartPlusUp,TheExiledFellow
creator calamity Fabsol
calamity mod universal collapse(noteblock) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dL0_N_xQlJY
